name: Global HRIS Leader
description: Senior profile with global HRIS implementation experience, strong governance and international exposure.

name: Technical HRIS Specialist
description: Deep technical specialist focused on configuration, integrations and HRIS platform optimization.
typical_risks: May need support with business change management

name: People Analytics Expert
description: Data-driven HR professional with strong analytics, dashboards and workforce planning expertise.
typical_risks: May lack full HRIS implementation experience
May be less experienced in stakeholder governance

name: HR Transformation Manager
description: Business transformation profile focused on process redesign, change adoption and HR operating model improvements.
typical_risks: May lack deep system configuration expertise

name: Payroll & Time Expert
description: Specialist in payroll, time and attendance, HR operations and payroll-related integrations.
typical_risks: May not fit broad HRIS leadership roles

name: International Talent Systems Manager
description: Talent-focused HRIS profile specialized in performance, learning, succession and leadership development systems.
typical_risks: Less exposed to payroll or core HR operations

name: High Potential HR Generalist
description: Promising HR professional with broad HR exposure and strong learning agility, but limited enterprise HRIS ownership.
typical_risks: Enterprise HRIS exposure not yet proven

name: Executive HR Technology Director
description: Strategic senior leader with HR technology roadmap ownership, vendor governance and global transformation exposure.
typical_risks: May be overqualified for operational roles
Hands-on configuration skills may be outdated

name: APAC HRIS Product Owner
description: Regional HRIS product owner with APAC experience, multilingual communication and platform roadmap ownership.
typical_risks: European labor law exposure may be limited

name: Data-Heavy but HR-Light Candidate
description: Excellent technical data profile with limited HR domain experience.
typical_risks: Needs validation on HR stakeholder management

name: Strong Match with Stability Risk
description: Candidate with strong skills and high match, but frequent job changes or unclear long-term stability.

name: Multilingual International Profile
description: Strong international communicator with multiple languages and cross-cultural project exposure.
